title: thelypteris xinpingensis
intro: Thelypteris xinpingensis, also known as Xinping maiden fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to the Yunnan-Guizhou Plateau in southwestern China. The Xinping maiden fern has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are said to have benefits for the cardiovascular system and immune system. Herbal preparations of the Xinping maiden fern may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
